title: Cotal: Agentic Coordination Layer
abstract: Cotal is an agentic coordination layer that seamlessly integrates autonomous agents, enabling efficient collaboration and decision-making across diverse ecosystems.
abstract_zh: 嘿朋友，听说过Cotal这个东西吗？它就是个超级智能中介系统，能把各种各样的自主小机器人无缝衔接起来，让它们能高效合作决策，简直就是大杂烩生态里的瑞士军刀。听起来就牛逼哄哄的对吧？
